import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import messagebox

class Calculator(tk.Tk):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.title('Beautiful Calculator')
        self.geometry('400x600')
        self.configure(bg='#2E2E2E')

        self.result_var = tk.StringVar()
        self.create_widgets()

    def create_widgets(self):
        result_entry = tk.Entry(self, textvariable=self.result_var, font='Arial 24', bd=10, insertwidth=2, width=14, borderwidth=4)
        result_entry.grid(row=0, column=0, columnspan=4)

        buttons = [
            '7', '8', '9', '/','
            '4', '5', '6', '*',
            '1', '2', '3', '-','
            'C', '0', '=', '+'
        ]

        row_val = 1
        col_val = 0
        for button in buttons:
            self.create_button(button, row_val, col_val)
            col_val += 1
            if col_val > 3:
                col_val = 0
                row_val += 1

    def create_button(self, text, row, col):
        button = tk.Button(self, text=text, padx=20, pady=20,
                           font='Arial 18', bg='#4B4B4B', fg='white',
                           command=lambda: self.on_button_click(text))
        button.grid(row=row, column=col, sticky='nsew')

    def on_button_click(self, char):
        if char == 'C':
            self.result_var.set('')
        elif char == '=':
            try:
                result = eval(self.result_var.get())
                self.result_var.set(result)
            except Exception:
                messagebox.showerror('Error', 'Invalid Input')
                self.result_var.set('')
        else:
            current_text = self.result_var.get()
            self.result_var.set(current_text + char)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app = Calculator()
    app.mainloop()

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import messagebox

class Calculator(tk.Tk):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.title('Beautiful Calculator')
        self.geometry('400x600')
        self.configure(bg='#2E2E2E')

        self.result_var = tk.StringVar()
        self.create_widgets()

    def create_widgets(self):
        result_entry = tk.Entry(self, textvariable=self.result_var, font='Arial 24', bd=10, insertwidth=2, width=14, borderwidth=4)
        result_entry.grid(row=0, column=0, columnspan=4)

        buttons = [
            '7', '8', '9', '/','
            '4', '5', '6', '*',
            '1', '2', '3', '-','
            'C', '0', '=', '+'
        ]

        row_val = 1
        col_val = 0
        for button in buttons:
            self.create_button(button, row_val, col_val)
            col_val += 1
            if col_val > 3:
                col_val = 0
                row_val += 1

    def create_button(self, text, row, col):
        button = tk.Button(self, text=text, padx=20, pady=20,
                           font='Arial 18', bg='#4B4B4B', fg='white',
                           command=lambda: self.on_button_click(text))
        button.grid(row=row, column=col, sticky='nsew')

    def on_button_click(self, char):
        if char == 'C':
            self.result_var.set('')
        elif char == '=':
            try:
                result = eval(self.result_var.get())
                self.result_var.set(result)
            except Exception:
                messagebox.showerror('Error', 'Invalid Input')
                self.result_var.set('')
        else:
            current_text = self.result_var.get()
            self.result_var.set(current_text + char)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app = Calculator()
    app.mainloop()

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import messagebox

class Calculator(tk.Tk):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.title('Beautiful Calculator')
        self.geometry('400x600')
        self.configure(bg='#2E2E2E')

        self.result_var = tk.StringVar()
        self.create_widgets()

    def create_widgets(self):
        result_entry = tk.Entry(self, textvariable=self.result_var, font='Arial 24', bd=10, insertwidth=2, width=14, borderwidth=4)
        result_entry.grid(row=0, column=0, columnspan=4)

        buttons = [
            '7', '8', '9', '/','
            '4', '5', '6', '*',
            '1', '2', '3', '-','
            'C', '0', '=', '+'
        ]

        row_val = 1
        col_val = 0
        for button in buttons:
            self.create_button(button, row_val, col_val)
            col_val += 1
            if col_val > 3:
                col_val = 0
                row_val += 1

    def create_button(self, text, row, col):
        button = tk.Button(self, text=text, padx=20, pady=20,
                           font='Arial 18', bg='#4B4B4B', fg='white',
                           command=lambda: self.on_button_click(text))
        button.grid(row=row, column=col, sticky='nsew')

    def on_button_click(self, char):
        if char == 'C':
            self.result_var.set('')
        elif char == '=':
            try:
                result = eval(self.result_var.get())
                self.result_var.set(result)
            except Exception:
                messagebox.showerror('Error', 'Invalid Input')
                self.result_var.set('')
        else:
            current_text = self.result_var.get()
            self.result_var.set(current_text + char)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app = Calculator()
    app.mainloop()

rawInput.content:
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import messagebox

class Calculator(tk.Tk):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.title('Beautiful Calculator')
        self.geometry('400x600')
        self.configure(bg='#2E2E2E')

        self.result_var = tk.StringVar()
        self.create_widgets()

    def create_widgets(self):
        result_entry = tk.Entry(self, textvariable=self.result_var, font='Arial 24', bd=10, insertwidth=2, width=14, borderwidth=4)
        result_entry.grid(row=0, column=0, columnspan=4)

        buttons = [
            '7', '8', '9', '/',
            '4', '5', '6', '*',
            '1', '2', '3', '-',
            'C', '0', '=', '+'
        ]

        row_val = 1
        col_val = 0
        for button in buttons:
            self.create_button(button, row_val, col_val)
            col_val += 1
            if col_val > 3:
                col_val = 0
                row_val += 1

    def create_button(self, text, row, col):
        button = tk.Button(self, text=text, padx=20, pady=20,
                           font='Arial 18', bg='#4B4B4B', fg='white',
                           command=lambda: self.on_button_click(text))
        button.grid(row=row, column=col, sticky='nsew')

    def on_button_click(self, char):
        if char == 'C':
            self.result_var.set('')
        elif char == '=':
            try:
                result = eval(self.result_var.get())
                self.result_var.set(result)
            except Exception:
                messagebox.showerror('Error', 'Invalid Input')
                self.result_var.set('')
        else:
            current_text = self.result_var.get()
            self.result_var.set(current_text + char)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app = Calculator()
    app.mainloop()
